application/xml.example:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?>
<ops:custom-group autoResolveMembership="true" xmlns:ops="http://webservice.vmware.com/vRealizeOpsMgr/1.0/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
    <ops:resourceKey>
        <ops:name>Sample Custom Group with Metric Key Condition</ops:name>
        <ops:adapterKindKey>Container</ops:adapterKindKey>
        <ops:resourceKindKey>Environment</ops:resourceKindKey>
    </ops:resourceKey>
    <ops:membershipDefinition>
        <ops:includedResources></ops:includedResources>
        <ops:excludedResources></ops:excludedResources>
        <ops:custom-group-properties/>
        <ops:membership-rule-group>
            <ops:resourceKindKey>
                <ops:resourceKind>VirtualMachine</ops:resourceKind>
                <ops:adapterKind>VMWARE</ops:adapterKind>
            </ops:resourceKindKey>
            <ops:statConditionRules key="cpu|usage_average">
                <ops:doubleValue>80.0</ops:doubleValue>
                <ops:compareOperator>GT</ops:compareOperator>
            </ops:statConditionRules>
            <ops:propertyConditionRules key="config|hardware|numCpu">
                <ops:doubleValue>4.0</ops:doubleValue>
                <ops:compareOperator>LT</ops:compareOperator>
            </ops:propertyConditionRules>
            <ops:resourceNameConditionRules name="VSAN" compareOperator="NOT_CONTAINS"/>
            <ops:relationshipConditionRules relation="CHILD" name="SampleStorage" compareOperator="CONTAINS" travesalSpecId="vSphere Storage-VMWARE-vSphere World"/>
            <ops:resourceTagConditionRules category="VMFolder" compareOperator="NOT_CONTAINS" stringValue="TestVMFolder"/>
        </ops:membership-rule-group>
    </ops:membershipDefinition>
</ops:custom-group>

201.description: The newly created custom group

get.summary: Get the storage costs
get.description:
Get the storage category based storage costs. Tag Category is the list of tag keys for data stores across your vCenters. You can select a category to see the list of tag values, the count of datastores and its capacity and cost details.
Note: If you have not assigned a tag for a datastore in vCenter, you will see an empty list for Tag Category, and the datastores are grouped under “Uncategorized” category in the response of this API.

parameters.name: X-Ops-API-use-unsupported
parameters.description:
Custom HTTP header name to be used by Suite API clients to acknowledge the fact
that the client intends to use a Suite API under the "/internal" endpoint even
though the backwards compatibility for these APIs is not guaranteed.

500.description: There was an error while returning the storage cost configurations

get.summary: Get the license costs
get.description:
the license cost of each VM that is computed based on one of the following license type:

Per-socket license cost
Enterprise License Agreement (ELA) cost
Desktop licensing cost
Per-core license cost
Per-TiB license cost

Note: License cost for VMware Software is based on either per socket/per core license or ELA costs or vSan TiB costs

expirationDate.description: Expiration date of license. After expiration date + grace period the license is not valid. This might be empty (null).

evaluationPeriod.description: Evaluation period of the license. This might be empty (null) if there is no evaluation.

expirationReason.description: The reason of expiration of the license. Might be expiration date overdue or missing usage report.

gracePeriod.description: The time period after which the license will be degraded. Days in millis. This might be empty (null).

licenseWarnings.description: List of warning messages that may occur at time events.

expirationPreWarn.description: The period of time of pre-warn messages. Days in millis. This might be empty (null).

VcfLicensePolicy.description: Policies define expiration dates, reasons and rules when expiration/usage-report events occur.

subscriptionQuantity.description: Subscription quantity that might be used for license degrade.

preWarn.description: Pre-warn duration. Days in millis. This might be empty (null).

key.description: The StatKey for the condition of the HardThreshold event

value.description: The current value (not the expected value) of the metric for the HardThreshold event

eventType.description:
Represents the type of an Event.
All values are valid for the field eventType in the Event object.
When used in the creation of a SymptomDefinition the following restrictions are
applicable for the Conditions that are defined as part of a Symptom Definition.

resourceId.description: The id of the resource for the event

startTimeUTC.description:
The start time for the event in UTC.
This time must be after >= 946684800000L, or January 1, 2000. Default is 946684800000L.
Value is ignored for Change events.

message.description: Event message, the message identifies the event in the system.

keyIndicator.description:
Whether the HardThreshold event is a key performance indicator
True indicates it is a KPI. False otherwise.

managedExternally.description:
If set to true, this event shall persist across collection cycles until another event is pushed
to change the status.
If set to false, this event will be cancelled during the next collection cycle if it is not pushed again

cancelTimeUTC.description:
Indicates that an event has been cancelled. For an externally managed event a new event with
the same message value must be sent with a cancelTime in order to cancel the
event.

htType.description: The type of Metric Event or Metric Event Condition

event-with-details.description: Class to represent external events with details.
